ast.name: appendText
ast.source: The format in which the due date is included in the task description.
ast.target: 任务描述中包含截止日期的格式。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: To configure the format of the date, see 'Date format'.
ast.target: 要配置日期格式，请参阅“日期格式”。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Dates in this format will be recognised as due dates.
ast.target: 此格式的日期将被识别为截止日期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, when opening the file containing a TODO that file will open in a new leaf. If disabled, it will replace the file that you currently have open.
ast.target: 如果启用，打开包含待办事项的文件时，该文件将在新叶子节点中打开。如果禁用，它将替换您当前打开的文件。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Open files in a new leaf
ast.target: 在新叶子节点中打开文件
